a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Reference"}]
b:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"What changed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"User action"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"New PyPI release"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory"}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Source-only fix"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"New dependency / entry point"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}]," + restart Hermes"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"externally-managed-environment"}]," (Debian/Ubuntu)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Use a venv or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --break-system-packages"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite schema changed (wondering?)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["See ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#schema-verification","children":"Schema Verification"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"E6 TripleStore split (v2.8)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Auto-migrates on first init. Backup at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"MEMORIA architecture (v3.0)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-creates 5 new tables on first init. No manual action needed"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"plugin.yaml"}]," / tool schema"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Restart Hermes only"}]]}]]}]]}]
c:["$","hr",null,{}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"PEP 668: externally-managed-environment on Debian / Ubuntu"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Debian 13 (and Ubuntu 24.04+) ship Python with PEP 668 protection. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," outside a virtualenv fails with:"]}]
f:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"error: externally-managed-environment\n× This environment is externally managed\n"}]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 1: Use a virtualenv (recommended)"}]}]
11:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"python3 -m venv ~/mnemosyne-venv\nsource ~/mnemosyne-venv/bin/activate\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Make sure Hermes is configured to use this venv's Python."}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 2: pipx (for CLI tools)"}]}]
14:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install pipx\npipx install mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 3: Override (quick fix, use with caution)"}]}]
16:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory --break-system-packages","language":"bash"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"This bypasses the guard. Fine for personal machines or containers. Not recommended for shared or multi-app systems."}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Solution 4: Source install with editable mode"}]}]
19:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"git clone https://github.com/AxDSan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\npip install -e . --break-system-packages","language":"bash"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Editable mode means future ",["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," is all you need — no re-install for most updates."]}]
1b:["$","hr",null,{}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Upgrading from v2.7 to v3.0.0"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"This is the most common jump for existing users. It covers 3 releases worth of changes. Read the relevant sections in order:"}]
1e:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.7 → v2.8"}]," — E6 TripleStore split (schema migration)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.8 → v2.9"}]," — MCP SDK 1.x compatibility (code only)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"v2.9 → v3.0"}]," — MEMORIA architecture (new tables)"]}],"\n"]}]
1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Step-by-step"}]
20:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# 1. Update the package\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\n\n# (If PEP 668 blocks you, use --break-system-packages)\n# pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory --break-system-packages\n\n# 2. Restart Hermes to load the new plugin/tools\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# 3. Verify\nhermes mnemosyne version\n# Should show: 3.0.0\n\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n# Check memory count is preserved\n\nhermes tools list | grep mnemosyne\n# Should show 17+ tools","language":"bash"}]
21:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What happens to your data on first run:"}]}]
22:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["v2.7 databases get auto-migrated by E6 on first BeamMemory init. Backup written to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["v3.0 creates 5 new MEMORIA tables (",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}],") via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}],". Existing tables are untouched."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"All existing memories, triples, embeddings remain intact."}],"\n"]}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"If anything goes wrong:"}]}]
24:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Restore pre-E6 backup\ncp ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db.pre_e6_backup  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Roll back to v2.7\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
25:["$","hr",null,{}]
26:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Version-by-Version Details"}]
27:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Upgrading to v3.0.0 (MEMORIA Architecture)"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":"The MEMORIA release introduces structured fact extraction and retrieval."}]
29:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema changes (all auto-created):"}]}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"children":["5 new tables: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}],"."]}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":["All use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}]," — zero risk to existing data."]}]
2c:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"New environment variables:"}]}]
2d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STRICT_FACT_MATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"not set"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enables token-based conservative fact matching"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_PROACTIVE_LINKING"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"not set"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enables zero-LLM graph edge creation at ingest"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_MEMORIA_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"gemini-2.0-flash-lite"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM model used for MEMORIA extraction"}]]}]]}]]}]
2e:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What to verify after update:"}]}]
2f:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Check MEMORIA tables exist\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name LIKE 'memoria_%'\").fetchall()\nprint('MEMORIA tables:', [t[0] for t in tables])\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":["Expected output: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MEMORIA tables: ['memoria_facts', 'memoria_timelines', 'memoria_instructions', 'memoria_preferences', 'memoria_kg']"}]]}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rollback:"}]}]
32:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.9.0'\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
33:["$","p",null,{"children":"The MEMORIA tables remain in the database but are ignored by older code. They are harmless. If you want them gone, export, delete DB, re-import."}]
34:["$","hr",null,{}]
35:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Upgrading to v2.9.0 (MCP SDK Compatibility)"}]
36:["$","p",null,{"children":"MCP server transport updated for SDK v1.x. Code-only change — no schema migration needed."}]
37:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
38:["$","p",null,{"children":"Only affects you if you use the MCP server directly (not via Hermes)."}]
39:["$","hr",null,{}]
3a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Upgrading to v2.8.0 (E6 TripleStore Split + CompressionPlugin)"}]
3b:["$","p",null,{"children":["This release splits the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," table into two purpose-specific tables and introduces optional content compression."]}]
3c:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Critical schema change: E6 TripleStore Split"}]}]
3d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Before v2.8, all triples lived in one ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," table with auto-invalidation semantics. This silently destroyed multi-valued annotations (entities, facts) whenever a memory had more than one."]}]
3e:["$","p",null,{"children":"After v2.8:"}]
3f:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," — retains current-truth facts (superseding behavior)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}]," — append-only, hosts mentions, fact, occurred_on, has_source (multi-valued by design)"]}],"\n"]}]
40:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Auto-migration (default):"}]}]
41:["$","p",null,{"children":["On first ",["$","code",null,{"children":"BeamMemory"}]," init, annotation-flavored rows are moved from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}],". A backup is created at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{db}.pre_e6_backup"}],"."]}]
42:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart\n# Check logs for:\n#   \"E6: auto-migrated N annotation rows from triples -> annotations.\"","language":"bash"}]
43:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Manual migration (explicit control):"}]}]
44:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE=0\nhermes gateway restart\n# BeamMemory logs a WARNING with pending row count\n\n# Preview\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py --dry-run\n\n# Apply\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py","language":"bash"}]
45:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"New optional feature: CompressionPlugin (v2.8+)"}]}]
46:["$","p",null,{"children":"Disabled by default. Enable via config or env var:"}]
47:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"export MNEMOSYNE_USE_CAVEMAN=1","language":"bash"}]
48:["$","p",null,{"children":"Or in code:"}]
49:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.core.config import MnemosyneConfig\nMnemosyneConfig.compression.enabled = True\n"}]}]
4a:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"What to verify after update:"}]}]
4b:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ncount = conn.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM annotations').fetchone()[0]\nprint(f'Annotations table has {count} rows')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
4c:["$","hr",null,{}]
4d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Schema Verification"}]
4e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Wondering if an update changed the SQLite schema? Here's how to check."}]
4f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Before updating (baseline)"}]
50:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\nschema = conn.execute(\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nfor row in schema:\n  print(row[0] + ';')\nconn.close()\n\" > ~/mnemosyne_schema_baseline.txt","language":"bash"}]
51:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"After updating (compare)"}]
52:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Dump the new schema\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\nschema = conn.execute(\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nfor row in schema:\n  print(row[0] + ';')\nconn.close()\n\" > ~/mnemosyne_schema_new.txt\n\n# Compare\ndiff ~/mnemosyne_schema_baseline.txt ~/mnemosyne_schema_new.txt","language":"bash"}]
53:["$","p",null,{"children":["New tables and columns appear as additions. Missing tables would appear as removals. Mnemosyne uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN"}]," with existence checks, so schema changes are additive — no destructive migrations."]}]
54:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Quick check: what version was my DB created by?"}]
55:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nnames = [t[0] for t in tables]\nif 'memoria_facts' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v3.0+ (MEMORIA)')\nelif 'annotations' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v2.8+ (E6 TripleStore split)')\nelif 'episodic_memory' in names:\n  print('DB schema: v2.0+ (BEAM)')\nelse:\n  print('DB schema: v1.x (legacy)')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
56:["$","hr",null,{}]
57:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"By Install Path"}]
58:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Option A: PyPI (recommended for users)"}]
59:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
5a:["$","p",null,{"children":"To verify the new version:"}]
5b:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne version\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\nhermes memory status","language":"bash"}]
5c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":["Option B: Source install (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}],")"]}]
5d:["$","p",null,{"children":["For most updates, only ",["$","code",null,{"children":"git pull"}]," is required:"]}]
5e:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"cd mnemosyne\ngit pull\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
5f:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":["Re-run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install -e ."}]," only when:"]}]}]
60:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"setup.py"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pyproject.toml"}]," added new dependencies"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["New ",["$","code",null,{"children":"entry_points"}]," or console scripts were added"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Package metadata changed"}],"\n"]}]
61:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"git pull\npip install -e \".[all,dev]\"\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
62:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Re-run the installer only when"}]," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne/install.py"}]," or the symlink logic changed:"]}]
63:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"git pull\npython -m mnemosyne.install\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
64:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Option C: Hermes MemoryProvider only (deploy script)"}]
65:["$","p",null,{"children":["This path symlinks ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/plugins/mnemosyne"}]," directly into the repo:"]}]
66:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"cd mnemosyne\ngit pull\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
67:["$","p",null,{"children":["No ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," needed — nothing is installed into a Python environment."]}]
68:["$","hr",null,{}]
69:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Database Migrations"}]
6a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS"}],", so most schema changes upgrade automatically."]}]
6b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run a migration script only when:"}]
6c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"The CHANGELOG explicitly mentions a database schema change"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You are upgrading from a pre-2.0 version"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"You see errors about missing columns or tables"}],"\n"]}]
6d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Available migration scripts"}]
6e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Script"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it does"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Migrates from v1.x ephemeral databases to the canonical v2+ path. Idempotent."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Manual E6 migration (v2.8). Only needed if you set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_MIGRATE=0"}],". Idempotent."]}]]}]]}]]}]
6f:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Preview first\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py --dry-run\n\n# Apply\npython scripts/migrate_triplestore_split.py","language":"bash"}]
70:["$","p",null,{"children":"All migration scripts are idempotent — safe to run multiple times."}]
71:["$","hr",null,{}]
72:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Rollback"}]
73:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Roll back to a specific version"}]
74:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Pin to a known good version\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\n\n# Or from source\ncd mnemosyne\ngit checkout v2.7.0\npip install -e .\n\n# Restart Hermes\nhermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
75:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Restore a database backup"}]
76:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# E6 auto-backup\ncp ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db.pre_e6_backup  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Or any custom backup\ncp ~/backups/mnemosyne_20260101.db  ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db","language":"bash"}]
77:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Export, nuke, re-import"}]
78:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Export current data\nhermes mnemosyne export --output ~/backup.json\n\n# Delete the database entirely\nrm ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Start fresh with old version\npip install 'mnemosyne-memory==2.7.0'\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# Re-import\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ~/backup.json","language":"bash"}]
79:["$","hr",null,{}]
7a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verifying an Update"}]
7b:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Version check\nhermes mnemosyne version\n\n# Stats (memories preserved?)\nhermes mnemosyne stats --global\n\n# Tools registered?\nhermes tools list | grep mnemosyne\n\n# Memory available?\nhermes memory status\n\n# Schema version (for the curious)\npython3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3, pathlib\ndb = pathlib.Path.home() / '.hermes' / 'mnemosyne' / 'data' / 'mnemosyne.db'\nconn = sqlite3.connect(str(db))\ntables = conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\").fetchall()\nprint(f'{len(tables)} tables: {[t[0] for t in tables]}')\nconn.close()\n\"","language":"bash"}]
7c:["$","hr",null,{}]
7d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Troubleshooting"}]
7e:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"\"Command not found\" after update"}]}]
7f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Entry points are registered at install time, not at runtime. Re-run the install:"}]
80:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install -e .","language":"bash"}]
81:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"\"No module named mnemosyne\" after update"}]}]
82:["$","p",null,{"children":"Your virtual environment may have been deactivated or the editable install broke. Re-install:"}]
83:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"pip install -e .","language":"bash"}]
84:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Plugin changes not taking effect"}]}]
85:["$","p",null,{"children":["Hermes caches plugins at startup. You ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"must"}]," restart:"]}]
86:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"hermes gateway restart","language":"bash"}]
87:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"\"externally-managed-environment\" errors"}]}]
88:["$","p",null,{"children":["You're on Debian 13+ / Ubuntu 24.04+ (PEP 668). See the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"#pep-668-externally-managed-environment-on-debian--ubuntu","children":"PEP 668 section"}],"."]}]
89:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Database errors after schema change"}]}]
8a:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"# Try auto-repair by restarting\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# If that fails, run the legacy migration\npython scripts/migrate_from_legacy.py\n\n# If errors persist, export, delete, re-import\nhermes mnemosyne export --output ~/backup.json\nrm ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data/mnemosyne.db\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ~/backup.json","language":"bash"}]
8b:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Memory count dropped after update"}]}]
8c:["$","p",null,{"children":["The E6 migration moves annotation rows from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"triples"}]," to a new ",["$","code",null,{"children":"annotations"}]," table. This does not delete memories. Check:"]}]
8d:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats --global","language":"bash"}]
8e:["$","p",null,{"children":"If counts look wrong, check the E6 migration log:"}]
8f:["$","$L97",null,{"code":"grep -i \"auto-migrated\\|E6\" ~/.hermes/logs/gateway.log","language":"bash"}]
